evals.prompt: Crie um design system completo para um app de fintech. Dark mode, accent verde.
evals.expected_output: Complete design system with tokens, component specs, semantic colors, typography, spacing
expectations: Design tokens defined (colors, typography, spacing, borders, shadows)
Component specifications for at least 5 UI components
Semantic color naming (primary, secondary, success, error, not raw hex)
Typography scale with defined sizes and line-heights
Spacing system based on consistent multiplier (4px or 8px)

evals.prompt: Converta este componente do Figma para React + Tailwind: Um card de usuario com avatar circular 48px, nome em bold 16px, email em gray 14px, botao 'Ver Perfil' em azul.
evals.expected_output: React component matching Figma description with proper Tailwind styling
expectations: React component with TypeScript props interface
Design tokens extracted from the description
Responsive component that adapts to container
Hover states on interactive elements
Accessible with proper ARIA attributes

evals.prompt: Faca um audit de acessibilidade nesta pagina de login com email e senha.
evals.expected_output: Accessibility audit report with contrast checks, focus states, ARIA labels, keyboard nav, error handling
expectations: Color contrast verification against WCAG AA standards
Focus state assessment for all interactive elements
ARIA labels and roles audit
Error message accessibility evaluation
Keyboard navigation flow analysis

evals.prompt: Crie um layout responsivo para um dashboard de analytics. 4 cards KPI + graficos + tabela.
evals.expected_output: Responsive dashboard layout with KPI cards, charts area, and data table
expectations: Responsive layout using CSS Grid or Flexbox
Grid system that adapts across breakpoints
Mobile layout stacking cards and sections vertically
4 KPI card components with consistent styling
Data table with responsive behavior (scroll or stack)

evals.prompt: Crie uma mini component library: Button, Input, Card, Modal, Toast. Com variantes e states.
evals.expected_output: Component library with 5 components, each with variants and states
expectations: All 5 components implemented (Button, Input, Card, Modal, Toast)
Multiple variants per component (primary/secondary/outline etc)
Interactive states defined (hover, focus, disabled, active)
Consistent design tokens applied across all components
